name: Marathon Petroleum Corp
summary: Marathon Petroleum Corporation (MPC) is an integrated downstream energy company operating through refining and midstream segments. MPC refines crude oil into products including gasoline (CBOB, CARBOB), ultra-low sulfur diesel, and other liquid hydrocarbons. Its midstream operations are conducted through MPLX LP, handling natural gas liquids, pipeline transportation, and storage. MPC trades on the NYSE under ticker MPC.

products.name: CBOB (Conventional Gasoline Blendstock for Oxygenate Blending)
products.description: Conventional gasoline blendstock refined from crude oil for fuel blending.

products.name: CARBOB (California Reformulated Gasoline Blendstock for Oxygenate Blending)
products.description: California-compliant reformulated gasoline blendstock meeting CARB standards.

products.name: Ultra-Low Sulfur Diesel (ULSD)
products.description: Refined diesel fuel meeting ultra-low sulfur content requirements.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGL)
products.description: Liquid hydrocarbons including ethane, butanes, and natural gasoline processed via midstream operations.

partnerships.description: MPC conducts midstream operations through consolidated subsidiary MPLX LP, a publicly traded partnership.
